---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature, exercise, or improvement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Problem Statement

What problem does this feature solve? What use case does it address?

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you envision this feature working.

## Alternatives Considered

Have you considered any alternative solutions or features?

## Implementation Suggestions

If you have ideas on how to implement this, please share.

## Affected Areas

Which parts of the curriculum would this impact?

- [ ] Learning modules
- [ ] Projects
- [ ] Assessments
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Infrastructure/tooling
- [ ] Other: _______________

## Priority

How important is this feature to your learning?

- [ ] Critical - blocks my progress
- [ ] High - significantly improves learning experience
- [ ] Medium - nice to have
- [ ] Low - minor improvement

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, or examples about the feature request here.

## Checklist

- [ ] I have searched existing feature requests to avoid duplicates
- [ ] I have clearly described the problem this solves
- [ ] I have provided a proposed solution
- [ ] I have considered alternatives
